library(MetBrewer) 
library(vegan)
library(grid)
library(doSNOW)
library(dplyr)
library(e1071)
library(compositions)

#Read data
fecal <- read.csv("../2_RA_filtering/fec_decontam_filtered.csv", row.names=1)


# Step 1: Find the smallest non-zero value
min_non_zero_value <- min(fecal[fecal > 0])

# Step 2: Replace all zero values with 1/10 of the smallest non-zero value
fecal <- fecal + (min_non_zero_value / 10)

# Step 3: CLR Transformation (using 'clr' from the 'compositions' package)
clr_transformed_taxa <- clr(fecal)

# Convert the CLR-transformed data into a data frame
clr_fecal_taxa <- as.data.frame(clr_transformed_taxa)

# Save clr_fecal_taxa
write.csv(clr_fecal_taxa, "20250523_fecal_CLR.csv")
